task_completion.description: Verify that all required entities are present in the diagram.
task_completion.visual_evidence: The draw.io diagram contains distinct nodes for 'OmniVerse Logistics', 'Stratosphere Holdings', 'Terra Firma Ventures', 'Nebula Trust', 'Elena R.', and 'Marcus T.'.

task_completion.description: Verify that nodes are connected with directional arrows labeled with direct ownership percentages.
task_completion.visual_evidence: Arrows connect the entity nodes showing the direction of ownership (pointing from owner to owned), and these arrows have percentage numbers labeled on or next to them.

task_completion.description: Verify the calculated Total Effective Ownership for Elena R.
task_completion.visual_evidence: The node for 'Elena R.' includes a text label stating her total effective ownership is 38% (e.g., 'Total: 38%').

task_completion.description: Verify the calculated Total Effective Ownership for Marcus T.
task_completion.visual_evidence: The node for 'Marcus T.' includes a text label stating his total effective ownership is 62% (e.g., 'Total: 62%').

task_completion.description: Verify that the natural person nodes are colored correctly based on the 25% UBO threshold.
task_completion.visual_evidence: The nodes for both 'Elena R.' and 'Marcus T.' are colored RED, as both of their effective ownership percentages (38% and 62%) are strictly greater than 25%.

task_completion.description: Verify that the final diagram was exported as a PDF to the correct directory.
task_completion.visual_evidence: A file manager, terminal window, or save dialog shows the file 'omniverse_ubo_map.pdf' being saved to or existing in the '~/Diagrams/exports/' directory.

integrity.description: Verify the agent used the draw.io GUI to create and edit the diagram.
integrity.visual_evidence: Screenshots show the draw.io graphical user interface open with the diagram being actively constructed, rather than just terminal commands editing an XML file.

integrity.description: Verify the agent opened the investigation report to obtain the ownership structure.
integrity.visual_evidence: Screenshots show a text editor, cat command, or similar tool displaying the contents of 'investigation_report_882.txt'.

integrity.description: Verify the agent exported the PDF using the application's native export functionality.
integrity.visual_evidence: Screenshots show the draw.io 'File -> Export as -> PDF' menu or the corresponding save dialog being used.

privileged_info_for_vlm: Entities required: OmniVerse Logistics, Stratosphere Holdings, Terra Firma Ventures, Nebula Trust, Elena R., Marcus T. Expected calculations: Elena R. has 38% total effective ownership. Marcus T. has 62% total effective ownership. Since both 38% and 62% are > 25%, both Elena R. and Marcus T. nodes must be colored RED. The final PDF must be exported to /home/ga/Diagrams/exports/omniverse_ubo_map.pdf.
